title: NEON RUN
note: v2 recipe: per-shot FLUX2 keyframe reference-locked to the hero fox (ref_image=qt_hero.png) -> LTX-2.3 image-to-video with CONTROLLED camera. Action comes from CONTENT (the fox running/leaping), not frantic camera. Side-on tracking keeps the fox centered and SHARP while the background streaks. Native 1280x704, NO ffmpeg upscale.
hero: a sleek wild red fox with a bright white-tipped tail and amber eyes
world: rain-soaked neon Tokyo back-streets at night, glowing pink and blue signage, wet reflective pavement, drifting steam, cinematic anamorphic widescreen, moody volumetric neon lighting, sharp crisp focus, film still, 35mm
neg: blurry, motion blur, out of focus, smeared, warped, deformed, low quality, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, duplicated fox

shots.keyframe: the red fox standing alert in a narrow rain-soaked neon Tokyo alley at night, glowing pink and blue signage, wet reflective pavement, drifting steam, cinematic anamorphic photograph, sharp crisp focus, moody volumetric neon light, film still, 35mm
shots.motion: the red fox stands alert in the neon alley, ears flicking, head turning slowly to scan, gentle rain falling, faint steam drifting, the camera holds steady on a locked tripod with a very slow subtle push-in, calm and crisp, sharp focus

shots.keyframe: close cinematic portrait of the red fox in the neon alley, a cold white searchlight beam falling across its face, amber eyes catching the light, wet fur, glowing pink and blue signage behind, shallow depth of field, sharp crisp focus, film still
shots.motion: a cold white searchlight beam slowly sweeps across the fox's face, its amber eyes widen and its ears pin back, the fox freezes in place, the camera holds steady with a slow gentle push-in on its face, crisp focus, no motion blur

shots.keyframe: the red fox in a low running stance in a long straight neon alley, body side-on to the camera, muscles taut, wet pavement, pink and blue neon signs receding down the alley, cinematic side profile, sharp crisp focus, film still
shots.motion: the red fox runs at a steady lope down the alley, the camera tracks smoothly alongside it in a side-on dolly keeping the fox centered and perfectly sharp, the pink and blue neon signs streak softly past in the background, wet reflections sliding by, controlled cinematic motion

shots.keyframe: the red fox mid-leap over a low stack of wooden crates in the neon alley, suspended in a graceful arc, side-on view, legs extended, tail streaming, neon glow behind, cinematic slow-motion film still, sharp crisp focus
shots.motion: the red fox leaps smoothly over a low stack of crates in gentle slow-motion, suspended at the apex of its arc, tail streaming, the camera tracks the arc side-on keeping the fox sharp and centered, water droplets hanging in the neon air, crisp focus

shots.keyframe: a sleek black quadruped security robot with a single glowing red scanner eye, standing at the mouth of a rain-soaked neon alley, wet metal panels reflecting pink and blue signage, menacing, cinematic anamorphic photograph, sharp crisp focus, film still
shots.motion: the black security robot steps slowly and deliberately into the neon alley, its red scanner eye sweeping side to side, metal feet reflecting in the wet pavement, faint sparks, the camera holds steady with a slow menacing push-in, crisp focus

shots.keyframe: the red fox running through a crowded narrow neon market street at night, paper lanterns and food stalls glowing, side-on view, steam rising, wet cobblestones, cinematic anamorphic photograph, sharp crisp focus on the fox, film still
shots.motion: the red fox weaves at a steady run through the glowing neon market street, the camera tracks it side-on keeping it centered and sharp, paper lanterns and stalls streaking softly past, steam drifting, controlled smooth cinematic tracking, crisp focus

shots.keyframe: the red fox sliding low under a parked neon-lit scooter in a wet alley, body stretched flat, sparks and reflections around it, dramatic low side angle, cinematic film still, sharp crisp focus
shots.motion: the red fox drops low and slides smoothly under a parked neon-lit scooter, body stretched flat, the camera holds low and steady at ground level tracking it side-on, faint sparks drifting overhead, controlled motion, crisp sharp focus

shots.keyframe: the red fox bounding up a steep wet metal staircase toward a neon-lit rooftop, the glittering neon city sprawling below, side-on view, dramatic upward composition, cinematic photograph, sharp crisp focus, film still
shots.motion: the red fox bounds smoothly up the metal staircase toward the rooftop, the camera rises steadily alongside it keeping the fox centered and sharp, the glittering neon city revealing itself below, controlled cinematic crane motion, crisp focus

shots.keyframe: the red fox mid-leap across a wide rooftop gap over a glowing neon street canyon far below, suspended at the apex, tail streaming, wide cinematic side view, dramatic slow-motion film still, sharp crisp focus
shots.motion: the red fox makes a huge graceful leap across the rooftop gap in gentle slow-motion, suspended at the apex with its tail streaming, the glowing neon canyon far below, the camera holds a smooth wide side-on tracking shot keeping the fox sharp, crisp focus, breathtaking

shots.keyframe: the red fox landing on a wet rooftop and rising into a run toward a giant glowing red neon torii sign, side-on view, water scattering, cinematic photograph, sharp crisp focus, film still
shots.motion: the red fox lands softly on the rooftop, recovers, and runs on toward a giant glowing red neon torii sign, the camera tracks side-on keeping it centered and sharp, water and gravel scattering, controlled smooth motion, crisp focus

shots.keyframe: the black security robot standing at the edge of a neon-lit rooftop, its red scanner eye glowing, thick neon-lit steam and fog rolling across the scene, the glittering city below, cinematic photograph, sharp crisp focus, film still
shots.motion: the black security robot stops at the rooftop edge, its red scanner eye sweeping slowly and uselessly as thick neon-lit steam rolls in and swallows the scene, the camera holds steady, controlled motion, crisp focus

shots.keyframe: the red fox standing at the edge of a neon-lit rooftop in silhouette against a vast glowing Tokyo skyline at night, sides gently rising and falling, calm and safe, cinematic wide photograph, sharp crisp focus, film still
shots.motion: the red fox stands calmly at the rooftop edge, silhouetted against the vast glowing neon skyline, its sides gently heaving as it catches its breath, safe at last, the camera slowly and smoothly pulls back in a controlled cinematic move, crisp focus, peaceful
